metadata.title: Be Still, My Soul
metadata.subtitle: Schlegel (1752) / Sibelius's Finlandia (1899) — English tr. Jane Borthwick (1855)
metadata.composer: Jean Sibelius (1865–1957), tune "Finlandia" (1899; this hymn adaptation 1932)
metadata.lyricist: Katharina von Schlegel (b. 1697, German original 1752); English translation by Jane Borthwick (1813–1897)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Schlegel's 1752 German original is PD by > 270 years. Borthwick's 1855 English translation is PD (d. 1897). Sibelius's Finlandia (1899) is PD as the U.S. copyright expired before 1978, and in the EU since 2027 it will be fully PD post-mortem auctoris 70 years from his 1957 death. As of 2026 the U.S. and most jurisdictions treat Finlandia as PD; this entry uses the pre-1923-published form
